stages.name: 1/6  Aim — horizontal, pitch LOCKED, varied target height (yaw only)
2a/6  Aim — vertical INTRO, tiny elevation, target always in view
2b/6  Aim — full vertical, ±6 blocks elevation (resume from 2a)
3/6  Combo school — the fighter learns to combo vs a walker
4/6  Mortal fight — vs a full-speed opponent (best-checkpointed)
5/6  Theobald bot — fine-tune vs the TheoBaldTheBird-style bot (FINAL)
